title: Borrower
description: Borrower entity extending the core Party with credit-specific attributes. Represents the obligor on one or more credit facilities, capturing financial profile data (revenue, EBITDA, leverage) and credit quality indicators used for underwriting, monitoring, and portfolio analytics.

allOf.description: A borrower entity in the credit domain, extending the core Party with financial metrics and credit profile attributes. The Borrower holds the latest-available financial snapshot used for credit analysis — revenue, EBITDA, total debt, and credit rating. For sponsor-backed borrowers, the sponsor_id links to the private equity firm. Update financial fields as new reporting periods become available.

industry.description: Primary industry classification of the borrower's business, used for sector concentration analysis and benchmarking. Populate with a standardized classification such as GICS sub-industry, NAICS code, or an internal taxonomy. Always required. Examples: 'Healthcare Services', 'Enterprise Software', 'Specialty Chemicals', 'Consumer Products', 'Oil & Gas Exploration'.

revenue.description: Most recent annual (trailing twelve months) revenue for the borrower, used for size-tiering and leverage calculations. Update when new financial statements are received. Omit if the borrower has not yet reported financials or if revenue is not applicable (e.g., pre-revenue startups, SPVs). Example: {"amount": 150000000, "currency": "USD"} for $150M in annual revenue.

ebitda.description: Most recent annual (trailing twelve months) EBITDA — earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization. This is the primary cash-flow proxy used for leverage ratio calculations (total_debt / ebitda) and interest coverage analysis. Should reflect the same period as revenue and may include credit-agreement-defined adjustments (add-backs). Omit if not yet reported. Example: {"amount": 30000000, "currency": "USD"} for $30M EBITDA.

total_debt.description: Total outstanding funded debt across all credit facilities, bonds, and other debt instruments as of the most recent reporting date. Used to compute leverage ratios (total_debt / ebitda) and assess overall indebtedness. Should include all on-balance-sheet debt but exclude undrawn commitments. Update as new borrowings or repayments occur. Omit if not yet reported. Example: {"amount": 120000000, "currency": "USD"} for $120M total debt.

credit_rating.description: External credit rating from a recognized agency (S&P, Moody's, Fitch) or an internal credit rating assigned by the lender's credit team. For external ratings, use the standard notation (e.g., 'BB+', 'Ba1', 'BB'). For internal ratings, use the firm's internal scale. Omit if the borrower is unrated. Update when a rating action occurs. Examples: 'BB+' (S&P), 'Ba1' (Moody's), 'Internal-4' (internal scale).

sponsor_id.description: UUID foreign key referencing the private equity sponsor Party entity, for borrowers that are portfolio companies of a PE fund. Enables sponsor-level aggregation and concentration analysis. Omit for non-sponsor-backed borrowers (e.g., publicly traded companies, founder-owned businesses). Example: 'c4d5e6f7-8901-2345-abcd-ef6789012345'.
